list.name: AI Events
list.rawQuery: SELECT a.timestamp as time, a.event_type || ': ' || SUBSTR(a.details, 1, 50) as text, CASE a.severity WHEN 'ERROR' THEN 'red' WHEN 'WARN' THEN 'yellow' ELSE 'green' END as color FROM audit_log a WHERE a.event_type IN ('AI_BYPASSED', 'AI_FALLBACK', 'TRIAGE') ORDER BY a.timestamp DESC

description: Eco-Pulse V3.0 — Zero-Waste Inventory Engine Dashboard

panels.title: 📊 Inventory Overview
panels.description: Complete inventory view sorted by FEFO (First Expiry, First Out) with color-coded urgency levels.

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT i.item_name, i.category, i.quantity, i.unit, i.expiry_date, CAST(julianday(i.expiry_date) - julianday(COALESCE((SELECT value FROM system_config WHERE key = 'simulated_date'), date('now'))) AS INTEGER) as days_left, i.status, CASE WHEN julianday(i.expiry_date) - julianday(COALESCE((SELECT value FROM system_config WHERE key = 'simulated_date'), date('now'))) <= 2 THEN '🔴 URGENT' WHEN julianday(i.expiry_date) - julianday(COALESCE((SELECT value FROM system_config WHERE key = 'simulated_date'), date('now'))) <= 7 THEN '🟡 WARNING' ELSE '🟢 SAFE' END as urgency, i.co2_per_unit_kg, i.input_method FROM inventory_items i WHERE i.status != 'EXPIRED' ORDER BY CASE WHEN i.expiry_date IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END, i.expiry_date ASC
targets.queryText: SELECT i.item_name, i.category, i.quantity, i.unit, i.expiry_date, CAST(julianday(i.expiry_date) - julianday(COALESCE((SELECT value FROM system_config WHERE key = 'simulated_date'), date('now'))) AS INTEGER) as days_left, i.status, CASE WHEN julianday(i.expiry_date) - julianday(COALESCE((SELECT value FROM system_config WHERE key = 'simulated_date'), date('now'))) <= 2 THEN '🔴 URGENT' WHEN julianday(i.expiry_date) - julianday(COALESCE((SELECT value FROM system_config WHERE key = 'simulated_date'), date('now'))) <= 7 THEN '🟡 WARNING' ELSE '🟢 SAFE' END as urgency, i.co2_per_unit_kg, i.input_method FROM inventory_items i WHERE i.status != 'EXPIRED' ORDER BY CASE WHEN i.expiry_date IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END, i.expiry_date ASC

panels.title: 🚨 Urgent (< 2 days)
panels.description: Items expiring within 2 days — requires immediate triage action.

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT COUNT(*) as "Urgent" FROM inventory_items WHERE julianday(expiry_date) - julianday(COALESCE((SELECT value FROM system_config WHERE key = 'simulated_date'), date('now'))) <= 2 AND status = 'ACTIVE'
targets.queryText: SELECT COUNT(*) as "Urgent" FROM inventory_items WHERE julianday(expiry_date) - julianday(COALESCE((SELECT value FROM system_config WHERE key = 'simulated_date'), date('now'))) <= 2 AND status = 'ACTIVE'

panels.title: 🟡 Warning (3–7 days)
panels.description: Items expiring within 3-7 days — should plan usage or donation.

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT COUNT(*) as "Warning" FROM inventory_items WHERE julianday(expiry_date) - julianday(COALESCE((SELECT value FROM system_config WHERE key = 'simulated_date'), date('now'))) BETWEEN 3 AND 7 AND status = 'ACTIVE'
targets.queryText: SELECT COUNT(*) as "Warning" FROM inventory_items WHERE julianday(expiry_date) - julianday(COALESCE((SELECT value FROM system_config WHERE key = 'simulated_date'), date('now'))) BETWEEN 3 AND 7 AND status = 'ACTIVE'

panels.title: 🟢 Safe (> 7 days)
panels.description: Items with more than 7 days until expiry — no immediate action needed.

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT COUNT(*) as "Safe" FROM inventory_items WHERE (julianday(expiry_date) - julianday(COALESCE((SELECT value FROM system_config WHERE key = 'simulated_date'), date('now'))) > 7 OR expiry_date IS NULL) AND status = 'ACTIVE'
targets.queryText: SELECT COUNT(*) as "Safe" FROM inventory_items WHERE (julianday(expiry_date) - julianday(COALESCE((SELECT value FROM system_config WHERE key = 'simulated_date'), date('now'))) > 7 OR expiry_date IS NULL) AND status = 'ACTIVE'

panels.title: 🍳 AI Recipe Suggestions
panels.description: Latest AI-generated recipes for expiring ingredients — AI applied to waste reduction.

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT r.title as "Recipe", r.ingredient_names as "Uses Expiring Items", r.estimated_servings as "Servings", ROUND(r.co2_saved_kg, 1) as "CO₂ Saved (kg)", CASE WHEN r.discount_percent > 0 THEN '$' || ROUND(r.suggested_price, 2) || ' (' || r.discount_percent || '% off)' ELSE '-' END as "Menu Deal", CASE WHEN r.ai_generated = 1 THEN '🤖 AI' ELSE '📋 Rule-based' END as "Source", r.created_at as "Generated" FROM recipes r ORDER BY r.created_at DESC LIMIT 5
targets.queryText: SELECT r.title as "Recipe", r.ingredient_names as "Uses Expiring Items", r.estimated_servings as "Servings", ROUND(r.co2_saved_kg, 1) as "CO₂ Saved (kg)", CASE WHEN r.discount_percent > 0 THEN '$' || ROUND(r.suggested_price, 2) || ' (' || r.discount_percent || '% off)' ELSE '-' END as "Menu Deal", CASE WHEN r.ai_generated = 1 THEN '🤖 AI' ELSE '📋 Rule-based' END as "Source", r.created_at as "Generated" FROM recipes r ORDER BY r.created_at DESC LIMIT 5

panels.title: 📈 Burn-Rate Forecast — Historical Usage
panels.description: Historical daily usage over time. Shows actual consumption trends by item.

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT CAST(strftime('%s', date(e.timestamp)) AS INTEGER) as time, SUM(ABS(e.qty_change)) as "Daily Usage" FROM inventory_events e WHERE e.action_type = 'USE' GROUP BY date(e.timestamp) ORDER BY time
targets.queryText: SELECT CAST(strftime('%s', date(e.timestamp)) AS INTEGER) as time, SUM(ABS(e.qty_change)) as "Daily Usage" FROM inventory_events e WHERE e.action_type = 'USE' GROUP BY date(e.timestamp) ORDER BY time

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT CAST(strftime('%s', date(e.timestamp)) AS INTEGER) as time, SUM(CASE WHEN e.action_type = 'ADD' OR e.action_type = 'RESTOCK' THEN e.qty_change ELSE 0 END) as "Restocks" FROM inventory_events e GROUP BY date(e.timestamp) ORDER BY time
targets.queryText: SELECT CAST(strftime('%s', date(e.timestamp)) AS INTEGER) as time, SUM(CASE WHEN e.action_type = 'ADD' OR e.action_type = 'RESTOCK' THEN e.qty_change ELSE 0 END) as "Restocks" FROM inventory_events e GROUP BY date(e.timestamp) ORDER BY time

panels.title: 🌍 Total CO₂ Saved
panels.description: Total CO₂ emissions prevented — from items consumed/donated before expiry plus recipe-based waste diversion.

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT ROUND(COALESCE((SELECT SUM(i.quantity * i.co2_per_unit_kg) FROM inventory_items i WHERE i.status IN ('CONSUMED', 'DONATED')), 0) + COALESCE((SELECT SUM(r.co2_saved_kg) FROM recipes r WHERE r.co2_saved_kg > 0), 0), 1) as "Total CO₂ Saved (kg)"
targets.queryText: SELECT ROUND(COALESCE((SELECT SUM(i.quantity * i.co2_per_unit_kg) FROM inventory_items i WHERE i.status IN ('CONSUMED', 'DONATED')), 0) + COALESCE((SELECT SUM(r.co2_saved_kg) FROM recipes r WHERE r.co2_saved_kg > 0), 0), 1) as "Total CO₂ Saved (kg)"

panels.title: 🌿 Potential CO₂ Savings from Recipes
panels.description: CO₂ savings achievable by cooking the AI-generated recipes — each row shows a recipe and the carbon emissions prevented if the recipe is prepared instead of wasting the ingredients.

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT r.title as "Recipe", r.ingredient_names as "Ingredients", r.estimated_servings as "Servings", ROUND(r.co2_saved_kg, 2) as "CO₂ Saved (kg)", r.created_at as "Generated" FROM recipes r WHERE r.co2_saved_kg > 0 ORDER BY r.created_at DESC LIMIT 20
targets.queryText: SELECT r.title as "Recipe", r.ingredient_names as "Ingredients", r.estimated_servings as "Servings", ROUND(r.co2_saved_kg, 2) as "CO₂ Saved (kg)", r.created_at as "Generated" FROM recipes r WHERE r.co2_saved_kg > 0 ORDER BY r.created_at DESC LIMIT 20

panels.title: 📋 Ingestion Activity Log
panels.description: Recent activity feed — input types, confidence scores, and latencies.

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT a.timestamp, a.input_method as "Input Type", a.event_type as "Event", CASE WHEN a.confidence >= 0.85 THEN '✅ ' || ROUND(a.confidence * 100) || '%' WHEN a.confidence IS NOT NULL THEN '⚠️ ' || ROUND(a.confidence * 100) || '%' ELSE '—' END as "Confidence", a.latency_ms || 'ms' as "Latency", a.model_used as "Model", SUBSTR(a.details, 1, 100) as "Details" FROM audit_log a WHERE a.event_type IN ('INGESTION', 'AI_CALL', 'AI_FALLBACK') ORDER BY a.timestamp DESC LIMIT 20
targets.queryText: SELECT a.timestamp, a.input_method as "Input Type", a.event_type as "Event", CASE WHEN a.confidence >= 0.85 THEN '✅ ' || ROUND(a.confidence * 100) || '%' WHEN a.confidence IS NOT NULL THEN '⚠️ ' || ROUND(a.confidence * 100) || '%' ELSE '—' END as "Confidence", a.latency_ms || 'ms' as "Latency", a.model_used as "Model", SUBSTR(a.details, 1, 100) as "Details" FROM audit_log a WHERE a.event_type IN ('INGESTION', 'AI_CALL', 'AI_FALLBACK') ORDER BY a.timestamp DESC LIMIT 20

panels.title: 🤖 AI Success vs Fallback
panels.description: Pie chart showing AI reliability — success, fallback, and bypass rates.

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT CASE WHEN event_type = 'AI_CALL' AND severity = 'INFO' THEN 'AI Success' WHEN event_type = 'AI_FALLBACK' THEN 'AI Fallback' WHEN event_type = 'AI_BYPASSED' THEN 'AI Bypassed' END as "Status", COUNT(*) as "Count" FROM audit_log WHERE event_type IN ('AI_CALL', 'AI_FALLBACK', 'AI_BYPASSED') GROUP BY "Status"
targets.queryText: SELECT CASE WHEN event_type = 'AI_CALL' AND severity = 'INFO' THEN 'AI Success' WHEN event_type = 'AI_FALLBACK' THEN 'AI Fallback' WHEN event_type = 'AI_BYPASSED' THEN 'AI Bypassed' END as "Status", COUNT(*) as "Count" FROM audit_log WHERE event_type IN ('AI_CALL', 'AI_FALLBACK', 'AI_BYPASSED') GROUP BY "Status"

panels.title: 🤖 AI Fallback Rate
panels.description: Percentage of AI calls that required fallback — lower is better.

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT ROUND(CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN event_type IN ('AI_FALLBACK', 'AI_BYPASSED') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS FLOAT) / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0) * 100, 1) as "Fallback Rate (%)" FROM audit_log WHERE event_type IN ('AI_CALL', 'AI_FALLBACK', 'AI_BYPASSED')
targets.queryText: SELECT ROUND(CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN event_type IN ('AI_FALLBACK', 'AI_BYPASSED') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS FLOAT) / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0) * 100, 1) as "Fallback Rate (%)" FROM audit_log WHERE event_type IN ('AI_CALL', 'AI_FALLBACK', 'AI_BYPASSED')

panels.title: 👁️ Pending Human Review Queue
panels.description: Items flagged for human review — hallucination-handling pipeline in action.

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT p.created_at as "Flagged At", p.suggested_item_name as "Suggested Item", p.suggested_quantity as "Qty", ROUND(p.confidence_score * 100) || '%' as "Confidence", p.failure_reason as "Reason", CASE p.reviewed WHEN 0 THEN '⏳ Pending' WHEN 1 THEN '✅ Approved' WHEN 2 THEN '❌ Rejected' END as "Status" FROM pending_human_review p ORDER BY p.reviewed ASC, p.created_at DESC
targets.queryText: SELECT p.created_at as "Flagged At", p.suggested_item_name as "Suggested Item", p.suggested_quantity as "Qty", ROUND(p.confidence_score * 100) || '%' as "Confidence", p.failure_reason as "Reason", CASE p.reviewed WHEN 0 THEN '⏳ Pending' WHEN 1 THEN '✅ Approved' WHEN 2 THEN '❌ Rejected' END as "Status" FROM pending_human_review p ORDER BY p.reviewed ASC, p.created_at DESC

panels.title: 🏆 Waste Prevention Score
panels.description: Composite metric — % of perishable items consumed/donated before expiring.

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT ROUND((CAST(consumed_before_expiry AS FLOAT) / NULLIF(total_items, 0)) * 100, 1) as "Waste Prevention Score (%)" FROM (SELECT COUNT(CASE WHEN status IN ('CONSUMED', 'DONATED') THEN 1 END) as consumed_before_expiry, COUNT(*) as total_items FROM inventory_items WHERE expiry_date IS NOT NULL)
targets.queryText: SELECT ROUND((CAST(consumed_before_expiry AS FLOAT) / NULLIF(total_items, 0)) * 100, 1) as "Waste Prevention Score (%)" FROM (SELECT COUNT(CASE WHEN status IN ('CONSUMED', 'DONATED') THEN 1 END) as consumed_before_expiry, COUNT(*) as total_items FROM inventory_items WHERE expiry_date IS NOT NULL)

panels.title: 📅 Activity Timeline & AI Event Annotations
panels.description: Time series with AI event annotations — visual audit trail showing when AI failed and fallbacks triggered.

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT CAST(strftime('%s', date(e.timestamp)) AS INTEGER) as time, SUM(CASE WHEN e.action_type = 'USE' THEN ABS(e.qty_change) ELSE 0 END) as "Actual Usage", SUM(CASE WHEN e.action_type = 'ADD' OR e.action_type = 'RESTOCK' THEN e.qty_change ELSE 0 END) as "Restocks" FROM inventory_events e GROUP BY date(e.timestamp) ORDER BY time
targets.queryText: SELECT CAST(strftime('%s', date(e.timestamp)) AS INTEGER) as time, SUM(CASE WHEN e.action_type = 'USE' THEN ABS(e.qty_change) ELSE 0 END) as "Actual Usage", SUM(CASE WHEN e.action_type = 'ADD' OR e.action_type = 'RESTOCK' THEN e.qty_change ELSE 0 END) as "Restocks" FROM inventory_events e GROUP BY date(e.timestamp) ORDER BY time

panels.title: 📊 Forecast Summary
panels.description: Complete burn-rate forecast for all active inventory items — predicted runout dates, daily consumption, and model confidence.

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT i.item_name as "Item", i.category as "Category", ROUND(i.quantity, 1) || ' ' || i.unit as "Current Stock", ROUND(f.daily_burn_rate, 2) as "Daily Burn Rate", ROUND(f.days_of_supply, 1) as "Days of Supply", f.predicted_runout_date as "Predicted Runout", CAST(julianday(f.predicted_runout_date) - julianday(COALESCE((SELECT value FROM system_config WHERE key = 'simulated_date'), date('now'))) AS INTEGER) as "Days Until Runout", CASE WHEN i.expiry_date IS NOT NULL THEN CAST(julianday(i.expiry_date) - julianday(COALESCE((SELECT value FROM system_config WHERE key = 'simulated_date'), date('now'))) AS INTEGER) ELSE NULL END as "Days Till Expiry", CASE WHEN i.expiry_date IS NULL THEN CASE WHEN f.days_of_supply <= 3 THEN '🔴 Understocked' WHEN f.days_of_supply <= 7 THEN '🟡 Understocked' ELSE '🟢 Well Stocked' END WHEN julianday(i.expiry_date) < julianday(f.predicted_runout_date) THEN '📦 Overstocked' WHEN CAST(julianday(f.predicted_runout_date) - julianday(COALESCE((SELECT value FROM system_config WHERE key = 'simulated_date'), date('now'))) AS INTEGER) = CAST(julianday(i.expiry_date) - julianday(COALESCE((SELECT value FROM system_config WHERE key = 'simulated_date'), date('now'))) AS INTEGER) THEN '🟢 Well Stocked' ELSE '🟡 Understocked' END as "Status", ROUND(f.weekend_multiplier, 2) as "Weekend Multiplier", ROUND(f.r_squared * 100, 1) || '%' as "Model R²", f.data_points_used as "Data Points" FROM forecasts f JOIN inventory_items i ON f.item_id = i.id WHERE i.status IN ('ACTIVE', 'EXPIRING_SOON') ORDER BY f.days_of_supply ASC
targets.queryText: SELECT i.item_name as "Item", i.category as "Category", ROUND(i.quantity, 1) || ' ' || i.unit as "Current Stock", ROUND(f.daily_burn_rate, 2) as "Daily Burn Rate", ROUND(f.days_of_supply, 1) as "Days of Supply", f.predicted_runout_date as "Predicted Runout", CAST(julianday(f.predicted_runout_date) - julianday(COALESCE((SELECT value FROM system_config WHERE key = 'simulated_date'), date('now'))) AS INTEGER) as "Days Until Runout", CASE WHEN i.expiry_date IS NOT NULL THEN CAST(julianday(i.expiry_date) - julianday(COALESCE((SELECT value FROM system_config WHERE key = 'simulated_date'), date('now'))) AS INTEGER) ELSE NULL END as "Days Till Expiry", CASE WHEN i.expiry_date IS NULL THEN CASE WHEN f.days_of_supply <= 3 THEN '🔴 Understocked' WHEN f.days_of_supply <= 7 THEN '🟡 Understocked' ELSE '🟢 Well Stocked' END WHEN julianday(i.expiry_date) < julianday(f.predicted_runout_date) THEN '📦 Overstocked' WHEN CAST(julianday(f.predicted_runout_date) - julianday(COALESCE((SELECT value FROM system_config WHERE key = 'simulated_date'), date('now'))) AS INTEGER) = CAST(julianday(i.expiry_date) - julianday(COALESCE((SELECT value FROM system_config WHERE key = 'simulated_date'), date('now'))) AS INTEGER) THEN '🟢 Well Stocked' ELSE '🟡 Understocked' END as "Status", ROUND(f.weekend_multiplier, 2) as "Weekend Multiplier", ROUND(f.r_squared * 100, 1) || '%' as "Model R²", f.data_points_used as "Data Points" FROM forecasts f JOIN inventory_items i ON f.item_id = i.id WHERE i.status IN ('ACTIVE', 'EXPIRING_SOON') ORDER BY f.days_of_supply ASC

panels.title: ⏰ Days of Supply Remaining
panels.description: How many days of stock remain per item — sorted by urgency.

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT i.item_name as "Item", ROUND(f.days_of_supply, 1) as "Days" FROM forecasts f JOIN inventory_items i ON f.item_id = i.id WHERE i.status IN ('ACTIVE', 'EXPIRING_SOON') ORDER BY f.days_of_supply ASC
targets.queryText: SELECT i.item_name as "Item", ROUND(f.days_of_supply, 1) as "Days" FROM forecasts f JOIN inventory_items i ON f.item_id = i.id WHERE i.status IN ('ACTIVE', 'EXPIRING_SOON') ORDER BY f.days_of_supply ASC

panels.title: 📅 Predicted Runout Timeline
panels.description: When each item is predicted to run out — earliest runout first. Weekend multiplier shows consumption spikes on weekends.

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT i.item_name as "Item", f.predicted_runout_date as "Runs Out On", CAST(julianday(f.predicted_runout_date) - julianday(COALESCE((SELECT value FROM system_config WHERE key = 'simulated_date'), date('now'))) AS INTEGER) as "Days Left", ROUND(i.quantity, 1) || ' ' || i.unit as "Stock Now", CASE WHEN f.weekend_multiplier > 1.3 THEN '📈 ' || ROUND(f.weekend_multiplier, 1) || 'x' WHEN f.weekend_multiplier < 0.7 THEN '📉 ' || ROUND(f.weekend_multiplier, 1) || 'x' ELSE '➡️ ' || ROUND(f.weekend_multiplier, 1) || 'x' END as "Weekend Effect" FROM forecasts f JOIN inventory_items i ON f.item_id = i.id WHERE i.status IN ('ACTIVE', 'EXPIRING_SOON') ORDER BY f.predicted_runout_date ASC
targets.queryText: SELECT i.item_name as "Item", f.predicted_runout_date as "Runs Out On", CAST(julianday(f.predicted_runout_date) - julianday(COALESCE((SELECT value FROM system_config WHERE key = 'simulated_date'), date('now'))) AS INTEGER) as "Days Left", ROUND(i.quantity, 1) || ' ' || i.unit as "Stock Now", CASE WHEN f.weekend_multiplier > 1.3 THEN '📈 ' || ROUND(f.weekend_multiplier, 1) || 'x' WHEN f.weekend_multiplier < 0.7 THEN '📉 ' || ROUND(f.weekend_multiplier, 1) || 'x' ELSE '➡️ ' || ROUND(f.weekend_multiplier, 1) || 'x' END as "Weekend Effect" FROM forecasts f JOIN inventory_items i ON f.item_id = i.id WHERE i.status IN ('ACTIVE', 'EXPIRING_SOON') ORDER BY f.predicted_runout_date ASC

panels.title: 📐 Forecast Model Confidence
panels.description: R² score for each item's forecast model — higher means the prediction is more reliable.

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT i.item_name || ' (R²)' as "metric", ROUND(f.r_squared * 100, 1) as "R² Score" FROM forecasts f JOIN inventory_items i ON f.item_id = i.id WHERE i.status IN ('ACTIVE', 'EXPIRING_SOON') ORDER BY f.r_squared ASC
targets.queryText: SELECT i.item_name || ' (R²)' as "metric", ROUND(f.r_squared * 100, 1) as "R² Score" FROM forecasts f JOIN inventory_items i ON f.item_id = i.id WHERE i.status IN ('ACTIVE', 'EXPIRING_SOON') ORDER BY f.r_squared ASC

panels.title: 🔴 Understocked Items
panels.description: Items that will run out well before they expire — need restocking. Ordered by severity (largest gap first).

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT i.item_name as "Item", CAST(julianday(f.predicted_runout_date) - julianday(COALESCE((SELECT value FROM system_config WHERE key = 'simulated_date'), date('now'))) AS INTEGER) as "Days Until Runout", CAST(julianday(i.expiry_date) - julianday(COALESCE((SELECT value FROM system_config WHERE key = 'simulated_date'), date('now'))) AS INTEGER) as "Days Till Expiry", ABS(CAST(julianday(i.expiry_date) - julianday(COALESCE((SELECT value FROM system_config WHERE key = 'simulated_date'), date('now'))) AS INTEGER) - CAST(julianday(f.predicted_runout_date) - julianday(COALESCE((SELECT value FROM system_config WHERE key = 'simulated_date'), date('now'))) AS INTEGER)) as "Gap (days)" FROM forecasts f JOIN inventory_items i ON f.item_id = i.id WHERE i.status IN ('ACTIVE', 'EXPIRING_SOON') AND i.expiry_date IS NOT NULL AND julianday(f.predicted_runout_date) < julianday(i.expiry_date) AND CAST(julianday(f.predicted_runout_date) - julianday(COALESCE((SELECT value FROM system_config WHERE key = 'simulated_date'), date('now'))) AS INTEGER) != CAST(julianday(i.expiry_date) - julianday(COALESCE((SELECT value FROM system_config WHERE key = 'simulated_date'), date('now'))) AS INTEGER) ORDER BY ABS(CAST(julianday(i.expiry_date) - julianday(COALESCE((SELECT value FROM system_config WHERE key = 'simulated_date'), date('now'))) AS INTEGER) - CAST(julianday(f.predicted_runout_date) - julianday(COALESCE((SELECT value FROM system_config WHERE key = 'simulated_date'), date('now'))) AS INTEGER)) DESC
targets.queryText: SELECT i.item_name as "Item", CAST(julianday(f.predicted_runout_date) - julianday(COALESCE((SELECT value FROM system_config WHERE key = 'simulated_date'), date('now'))) AS INTEGER) as "Days Until Runout", CAST(julianday(i.expiry_date) - julianday(COALESCE((SELECT value FROM system_config WHERE key = 'simulated_date'), date('now'))) AS INTEGER) as "Days Till Expiry", ABS(CAST(julianday(i.expiry_date) - julianday(COALESCE((SELECT value FROM system_config WHERE key = 'simulated_date'), date('now'))) AS INTEGER) - CAST(julianday(f.predicted_runout_date) - julianday(COALESCE((SELECT value FROM system_config WHERE key = 'simulated_date'), date('now'))) AS INTEGER)) as "Gap (days)" FROM forecasts f JOIN inventory_items i ON f.item_id = i.id WHERE i.status IN ('ACTIVE', 'EXPIRING_SOON') AND i.expiry_date IS NOT NULL AND julianday(f.predicted_runout_date) < julianday(i.expiry_date) AND CAST(julianday(f.predicted_runout_date) - julianday(COALESCE((SELECT value FROM system_config WHERE key = 'simulated_date'), date('now'))) AS INTEGER) != CAST(julianday(i.expiry_date) - julianday(COALESCE((SELECT value FROM system_config WHERE key = 'simulated_date'), date('now'))) AS INTEGER) ORDER BY ABS(CAST(julianday(i.expiry_date) - julianday(COALESCE((SELECT value FROM system_config WHERE key = 'simulated_date'), date('now'))) AS INTEGER) - CAST(julianday(f.predicted_runout_date) - julianday(COALESCE((SELECT value FROM system_config WHERE key = 'simulated_date'), date('now'))) AS INTEGER)) DESC

panels.title: 📦 Overstocked Items
panels.description: Items that will expire before you use them up — consider donating or recipes. Ordered by severity (largest gap first).

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT i.item_name as "Item", CAST(julianday(f.predicted_runout_date) - julianday(COALESCE((SELECT value FROM system_config WHERE key = 'simulated_date'), date('now'))) AS INTEGER) as "Days Until Runout", CAST(julianday(i.expiry_date) - julianday(COALESCE((SELECT value FROM system_config WHERE key = 'simulated_date'), date('now'))) AS INTEGER) as "Days Till Expiry", ABS(CAST(julianday(i.expiry_date) - julianday(COALESCE((SELECT value FROM system_config WHERE key = 'simulated_date'), date('now'))) AS INTEGER) - CAST(julianday(f.predicted_runout_date) - julianday(COALESCE((SELECT value FROM system_config WHERE key = 'simulated_date'), date('now'))) AS INTEGER)) as "Gap (days)" FROM forecasts f JOIN inventory_items i ON f.item_id = i.id WHERE i.status IN ('ACTIVE', 'EXPIRING_SOON') AND i.expiry_date IS NOT NULL AND julianday(i.expiry_date) < julianday(f.predicted_runout_date) ORDER BY ABS(CAST(julianday(i.expiry_date) - julianday(COALESCE((SELECT value FROM system_config WHERE key = 'simulated_date'), date('now'))) AS INTEGER) - CAST(julianday(f.predicted_runout_date) - julianday(COALESCE((SELECT value FROM system_config WHERE key = 'simulated_date'), date('now'))) AS INTEGER)) DESC
targets.queryText: SELECT i.item_name as "Item", CAST(julianday(f.predicted_runout_date) - julianday(COALESCE((SELECT value FROM system_config WHERE key = 'simulated_date'), date('now'))) AS INTEGER) as "Days Until Runout", CAST(julianday(i.expiry_date) - julianday(COALESCE((SELECT value FROM system_config WHERE key = 'simulated_date'), date('now'))) AS INTEGER) as "Days Till Expiry", ABS(CAST(julianday(i.expiry_date) - julianday(COALESCE((SELECT value FROM system_config WHERE key = 'simulated_date'), date('now'))) AS INTEGER) - CAST(julianday(f.predicted_runout_date) - julianday(COALESCE((SELECT value FROM system_config WHERE key = 'simulated_date'), date('now'))) AS INTEGER)) as "Gap (days)" FROM forecasts f JOIN inventory_items i ON f.item_id = i.id WHERE i.status IN ('ACTIVE', 'EXPIRING_SOON') AND i.expiry_date IS NOT NULL AND julianday(i.expiry_date) < julianday(f.predicted_runout_date) ORDER BY ABS(CAST(julianday(i.expiry_date) - julianday(COALESCE((SELECT value FROM system_config WHERE key = 'simulated_date'), date('now'))) AS INTEGER) - CAST(julianday(f.predicted_runout_date) - julianday(COALESCE((SELECT value FROM system_config WHERE key = 'simulated_date'), date('now'))) AS INTEGER)) DESC

panels.title: 🟢 Well Stocked Items
panels.description: Items perfectly balanced — predicted runout matches expiry exactly.

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT i.item_name as "Item", CAST(julianday(f.predicted_runout_date) - julianday(COALESCE((SELECT value FROM system_config WHERE key = 'simulated_date'), date('now'))) AS INTEGER) as "Days Until Runout", CAST(julianday(i.expiry_date) - julianday(COALESCE((SELECT value FROM system_config WHERE key = 'simulated_date'), date('now'))) AS INTEGER) as "Days Till Expiry", ABS(CAST(julianday(i.expiry_date) - julianday(COALESCE((SELECT value FROM system_config WHERE key = 'simulated_date'), date('now'))) AS INTEGER) - CAST(julianday(f.predicted_runout_date) - julianday(COALESCE((SELECT value FROM system_config WHERE key = 'simulated_date'), date('now'))) AS INTEGER)) as "Gap (days)" FROM forecasts f JOIN inventory_items i ON f.item_id = i.id WHERE i.status IN ('ACTIVE', 'EXPIRING_SOON') AND i.expiry_date IS NOT NULL AND CAST(julianday(f.predicted_runout_date) - julianday(COALESCE((SELECT value FROM system_config WHERE key = 'simulated_date'), date('now'))) AS INTEGER) = CAST(julianday(i.expiry_date) - julianday(COALESCE((SELECT value FROM system_config WHERE key = 'simulated_date'), date('now'))) AS INTEGER) ORDER BY ABS(CAST(julianday(i.expiry_date) - julianday(COALESCE((SELECT value FROM system_config WHERE key = 'simulated_date'), date('now'))) AS INTEGER) - CAST(julianday(f.predicted_runout_date) - julianday(COALESCE((SELECT value FROM system_config WHERE key = 'simulated_date'), date('now'))) AS INTEGER)) DESC
targets.queryText: SELECT i.item_name as "Item", CAST(julianday(f.predicted_runout_date) - julianday(COALESCE((SELECT value FROM system_config WHERE key = 'simulated_date'), date('now'))) AS INTEGER) as "Days Until Runout", CAST(julianday(i.expiry_date) - julianday(COALESCE((SELECT value FROM system_config WHERE key = 'simulated_date'), date('now'))) AS INTEGER) as "Days Till Expiry", ABS(CAST(julianday(i.expiry_date) - julianday(COALESCE((SELECT value FROM system_config WHERE key = 'simulated_date'), date('now'))) AS INTEGER) - CAST(julianday(f.predicted_runout_date) - julianday(COALESCE((SELECT value FROM system_config WHERE key = 'simulated_date'), date('now'))) AS INTEGER)) as "Gap (days)" FROM forecasts f JOIN inventory_items i ON f.item_id = i.id WHERE i.status IN ('ACTIVE', 'EXPIRING_SOON') AND i.expiry_date IS NOT NULL AND CAST(julianday(f.predicted_runout_date) - julianday(COALESCE((SELECT value FROM system_config WHERE key = 'simulated_date'), date('now'))) AS INTEGER) = CAST(julianday(i.expiry_date) - julianday(COALESCE((SELECT value FROM system_config WHERE key = 'simulated_date'), date('now'))) AS INTEGER) ORDER BY ABS(CAST(julianday(i.expiry_date) - julianday(COALESCE((SELECT value FROM system_config WHERE key = 'simulated_date'), date('now'))) AS INTEGER) - CAST(julianday(f.predicted_runout_date) - julianday(COALESCE((SELECT value FROM system_config WHERE key = 'simulated_date'), date('now'))) AS INTEGER)) DESC

panels.title: ⏳ Running Low — Under 7 Days of Supply
panels.description: Items predicted to run out within 7 days based on burn-rate forecasting. Items with ≤ 3 days are auto-marked EXPIRING_SOON.

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT i.item_name as "Item", ROUND(f.days_of_supply, 1) as "Days of Supply", ROUND(f.daily_burn_rate, 2) as "Daily Burn Rate", i.quantity as "Current Qty", i.unit as "Unit", f.predicted_runout_date as "Predicted Runout", i.status as "Status" FROM forecasts f JOIN inventory_items i ON f.item_id = i.id WHERE f.days_of_supply < 7 AND f.days_of_supply IS NOT NULL AND i.status IN ('ACTIVE', 'EXPIRING_SOON') ORDER BY f.days_of_supply ASC
targets.queryText: SELECT i.item_name as "Item", ROUND(f.days_of_supply, 1) as "Days of Supply", ROUND(f.daily_burn_rate, 2) as "Daily Burn Rate", i.quantity as "Current Qty", i.unit as "Unit", f.predicted_runout_date as "Predicted Runout", i.status as "Status" FROM forecasts f JOIN inventory_items i ON f.item_id = i.id WHERE f.days_of_supply < 7 AND f.days_of_supply IS NOT NULL AND i.status IN ('ACTIVE', 'EXPIRING_SOON') ORDER BY f.days_of_supply ASC

panels.title: 💰 Menu Discount Suggestions
panels.description: AI-suggested discounted menu items for recipes using expiring ingredients. Helps move perishable stock faster via promotional pricing.

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT title as "Recipe", ingredient_names as "Uses Ingredients", estimated_servings as "Servings", ROUND(original_price, 2) as "Original Price ($)", ROUND(suggested_price, 2) as "Deal Price ($)", discount_percent as "Discount %", ROUND(co2_saved_kg, 2) as "CO₂ Saved (kg)", created_at as "Created" FROM recipes WHERE discount_percent > 0 AND discount_percent IS NOT NULL ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 20
targets.queryText: SELECT title as "Recipe", ingredient_names as "Uses Ingredients", estimated_servings as "Servings", ROUND(original_price, 2) as "Original Price ($)", ROUND(suggested_price, 2) as "Deal Price ($)", discount_percent as "Discount %", ROUND(co2_saved_kg, 2) as "CO₂ Saved (kg)", created_at as "Created" FROM recipes WHERE discount_percent > 0 AND discount_percent IS NOT NULL ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 20

title: 🌿 Eco-Pulse V3.0 — Zero-Waste Dashboard
